executive_summary: OFAC added 12 new entities to the SDN list, primarily targeting individuals and entities involved in Sudan and Iraq. The additions are associated with the SUDAN-EO14098 and SDGT programs. No entities were removed or updated.

risk_implications.description: Increased risk of terrorism and instability due to added SDGT designations
Potential for increased illicit activity due to added SUDAN-EO14098 designations in Colombia

program_highlights.note: Designations primarily target entities involved in Sudan-related activities
Designations target individuals involved in global terrorism

compliance_recommendations: Monitor transactions involving newly designated entities
Enhance due diligence for activities involving Sudan and Iraq
Review and update internal watchlists to reflect new designations
